Hero.title: Software Engineering Student & Tech Support Professional.
Hero.description: Hi, I'm Esteban Mora. A Software Engineering student with 3+ years of technical support experience in SaaS. Passionate about building well-crafted systems and helping users succeed — from architecture to interface.

paragraphs.p1: I'm Esteban Mora, a Software Engineering student and bilingual tech professional based in Toronto, Canada. Alongside my studies, I've built 3+ years of professional experience across customer service at Teleperformance and client-facing administrative work at Legacy Barber Co. — where I also apply my technical skills in content creation and process automation.
paragraphs.p2: On the technical side, I'm passionate about building well-crafted systems from the ground up — whether that's architecting a backend API, designing a clean interface, or debugging a problem under pressure. I believe great software is born where solid engineering meets intentional design.
paragraphs.p3: Working in high-volume customer-facing environments with tools like Zendesk, Slack and Excel taught me something most developers learn much later: how real users interact with software, what frustrates them, and what makes them succeed. That perspective shapes the way I write code.
paragraphs.p4: I'm currently open to hybrid Technical Support Engineer, Customer Success, and Junior Developer roles in Toronto. I'm looking for a team where I can contribute from day one, grow alongside experienced people, and keep building things that matter.

Contact.title: Let's work together
Contact.description: Open to internships, freelance projects and collaborations. My inbox is always open.
